creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, 03 Mar 2012 16:35:52 +0200, Andriy Gapon wrote

Hi Mark, hi Andriy,

> Just a note that 1.49 has been released.
>
> Regarding the exp-run results and this comment
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/156253#reply7 
> -  I think that the number of the failing ports is 
> sufficiently small and the current boost version is 
> sufficiently outdated to justify breaking those ports and 
> putting onus on their maintainers and upstreams.
> [...]

Thanks for your mail.

Simgear 2.6.0 is out (and should hopefully build with latest boost) but
depends on graphics/osg >= 3.0.0 which is not yet available in ports. I
have contacted amdmi3@ ; he should be able to update the port soon. I'll
then update the Simgear + Flightgear ports.

If this update takes too much time, I'll try to fix current Simgear to
make it build with newer boost. Meanwhile, feel free to mark current
Simgear as BROKEN if this is necessary to have a newer boost in ports.

Best regards,

--
Ganael LAPLANCHE <ganael.laplanche@martymac.org>
http://www.martymac.org | http://contribs.martymac.org
